name: memory-cli
description: Build, query, test, and optimize local agent memory CLIs with retrieval tests.

interface.shortDescription: Build tested local memory systems for agents.
interface.longDescription: Memory CLI teaches agents to create, query, test, and evolve durable workspace memory systems where important memories are backed by retrieval tests.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a local memory CLI in this workspace.
Search project memory before this task.
Add a durable memory with retrieval tests.
